conviction_board.name: ONGC
conviction_board.narrative: ONGC scores 62/100 on our engine. Full bullish alignment. 20 above 50, 50 above 200, price above everything. This is what institutional buying looks like on a chart. Momentum is picking up nicely — RSI at 61 has room to run before hitting overbought territory. Above-average volume (1.8x) adds weight to the move. Newsflow is mildly positive — 3 items in the last 48 hours — 'ONGC shares rally 6% after govt cuts crude oil royalty; CLSA explains why it’s a big boost' (ET Markets) is the headline to watch. Market headwinds are real — 50% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Oil & Gas is one of the stronger sectors right now (score 61). Bull case: sustains above ₹299 and pushes towards ₹322 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹284 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Look for a close above ₹306 as confirmation. Verdict: BUY. Entry zone near ₹300 — speed matters. Outlook: Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish.
